Otho, Denarius, 69, Rome, Silver, NGC, AU★ 5/5-5/5, RIC:10
Bare head of Otho, right., Securitas, draped, standing left, holding wreath in right hand and sceptre in left hand., Graded NGC AU★ Strike : 5/5 Surface : 5/5.

The reign of Otto was short - barely three months - and only gold and silver coins were minted. His coinage was therefore rare and sought-after. Our example is in superb condition, still freshly minted and featuring a remarkable portrait! This denarius is all the more beauti...

sales.description:
Ancients
Otho (January-April AD 69). AR denarius (17mm, 3.28 gm, 5h). NGC AU 4/5 - 2/5. Rome, AD 15 January-April 69. IMP OTHO CAESAR AVG TR P, bare, bewigged head of Otho right / SECV-RI-TAS P R, Securitas standing facing, head left, draped, wreath in outstretched right hand, grounded scepter in left. RIC I 10.
